title: jenkins pipeline error from podman in podman: error in copier subprocess: error changing to intended-new-root directory \"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/5d...f1/merged\": chdir /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/5d...f1/merged: no such file or directory

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

comments.body:
@321sp Does this happens intermittently or always ?

I am suspecting intermittently as there were few race conditions in `c/storage` in past but they were fixed.
I tried running multiple builds with `COPY --chown=` concurrently but i was unable to reproduce this with `main` branch.

I believe the most common race was fixed here https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1037 and fix is not on the release which you are using.
Could you please try using the podman from `main` branch  ?
@flouthoc This is happening intermittently when running multiple builds remotely and running under Jenkins as a CI/CD pipeline
@321sp Would it be possible to try running `main` branch on your jenkins. I am playing with `main` and unable to reproduce this issue.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Since this works in main, I am going to close.
